ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED(StageName) && ( (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Discovery") && NOT(Discovery_Sign_Off_Complete__c)) || (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Requirement Gathering") && NOT(Requirement_Gathering_Sign_Off_Complete__c)) || (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "Requirement Documentation") && NOT(Requirement_Documentation_Sign_Off_Complete__c)) || (ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(StageName), "User Story Finalization") && NOT(User_Story_Finalization_Sign_Off_Complete__c)) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please complete and approve the sign-off document for the current stage before advancing.
